chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 699 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.26 2. For orders on CMA No.3933/2022 3. For hearing of main case 24.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Fahad, advocate for the applicant Following question of law is proposed for determination: Whether the learned Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue erred in law in upholding the order of the Commissioner Inland Revenue (Appeals) in violation of Rule 8 of the Sales Tax Rules, 2006? He states that the question has already been decided against the department by virtue of order of this court dated 14.03.2023 passed in CP D 1090 of 2021. He further states that the aforementioned edict is binding upon this bench, therefore, this court may be pleased to apply the ratio in mutatis mutandis and dismiss this reference application, subject to the right of appeal before the honourable Supreme Court. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
